First Features

The first working release should support:

* User registration and login
* Domain search
* Domain listings
* Seller accounts
* Buyer accounts
* AI domain suggestions
* Dashboard
* Admin panel
* REST API
* OpenAPI/Swagger documentation
* Docker deployment

Future AI Features

* AI startup-name generator
* AI logo generation
* AI slogan generator
* AI website builder
* AI landing-page generator
* AI SEO optimization
* AI business-plan generator
* AI pricing assistant
* AI domain appraisal
* AI support agent

Future Marketplace Expansion

After domains, the same platform can support:

* AI models
* APIs
* SDKs
* SaaS products
* Website templates
* Mobile app templates
* Plugins
* Themes
* Digital assets
* Datasets
* Smart contracts
* AI agents
* Courses
* E-books
